'''Kile''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Zhar/Legends|Zhar]] in the [[Zhar system]]. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] established a [[Rebel base (Kile)|base]] on the moon, from where they organized the [[Battle of Gall|mission]] to rescue [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] from [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']]. The other moon, [[Gall/Legends|Gall]], was a populated, terrestrial world home to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] enclave.

{{Moon-stub}}
